title: Assistant Manager / Manager, Corporate Advisory
description:
• Permanent headcount, based in Singapore
  • Leading global advisory firm
  • Candidates must have valuation experience, preferably within an accounting / professional services firm or a banking environment

Responsibilities would include:

  • Lead and execute valuation engagements, managing teams to ensure high-quality outcomes
  • Conduct valuations of businesses, securities, and intangible assets using various methodologies including discounted cash flow, capitalised maintainable earnings, and option pricing models.
  • Analyse market data, and industry trends to determine valuation inputs.
  • Construct, review and amend financial models.
  • Prepare detailed valuation reports and presentations for clients.
  • Review and interpret financial statements to determine business operations, drivers and performance indicators.
  • Assisting in other advisory work such as transaction support, mergers & acquisitions, business planning and reorganisation
  • Working closely with directors on client management, practice development, and business development activities

Profile of ideal candidate:

  • Bachelor’s degree in any discipline, professional qualifications such as CPA, FRM, CFA, or CVA are advantageous
  • 4 to 8 years of valuation or financial due diligence experience, preferably within an accounting or professional services firm, or a bank
  • Strong written and verbal communication skills, combined with excellent analytical and evaluation abilities and strong interpersonal skills
  • Highly self-motivated, capable of working independently, while also building effective relationships with senior management and thriving in a collaborative team environment
  • Strong work ethic, interpersonal skills, and passion for adding value

If you are keen to have a preliminary chat, please send me your CV directly to jemelee.triveles@ethosbc.com quoting reference number CL/BH-24531/FB.

Data collected is strictly used for recruitment purposes only and will be treated with strictest confidence. Your profile will also only be sent out after seeking your consent.

Due to the high volume of applications received during this period, we seek your understanding that we will only be contacting shortlisted candidates.

EA Personnel No. R1548449
BeathChapman Pte Ltd
EA Licence: 16S8112

postedCompany.description:
Established in 2005 in Sydney, Ethos BeathChapman (EBC) today has 7 offices worldwide. In 2017, we secured the strategic investment of Will, an international group of HR solutions companies. EBC acquired Quay Appointments and set up CONNECT, EBC’s AI-powered sourcing specialist in 2018.

Passionate about staying innovative, we embrace new AI technologies, data and analytics, and are committed to keeping an agile mindset to deliver market leading executive recruitment solutions, tailored for our clients and candidates.
postedCompany.name: BEATHCHAPMAN (PTE. LTD.)
